mired.ponder.analog_gate_ge.text_1: Analog Gates only allow analog signals of certain strengths to be passed along
mired.ponder.analog_gate_ge.text_10: But increasing the value now, turns the output off again, since it is greater, when in less than or equal mode
mired.ponder.analog_gate_ge.text_2: By default, Analog Gates are in "Greater than or Equal" mode, this can be changed by right-clicking the block base
mired.ponder.analog_gate_ge.text_3: Using the value panel, the selected signal strength can be selected
mired.ponder.analog_gate_ge.text_5: When the input signal strength is less than the configured value, the output will be 0
mired.ponder.analog_gate_ge.text_7: Once the value is reached, the output signal strength will equal the input
mired.ponder.analog_gate_ge.text_8: Now, right-clicking the base cycles it's mode. Since the input is equal to the selected value, nothing changes
